scraped.text: Best Spas In Delhi-NCR Across Budgets | LBB Similar Guides Salons & Spas Best Spas In Delhi: 9 Spas In Delhi That Are Perfect To Pamper Yourself At By Yukti 4672 Interested | 18K Views Living in Delhi means one thing for sure — you constantly need time and space to help reduce stress, relaxing and rejuvenating. Sure, going for trips or a staycation can be  an  answer, but it's not always easy to do that. Sometimes you need a shorter and equally refreshing solution, and that's where spas come in. A spa session is beneficial not just for your physical health, but also for your mental health. How, you ask? A good spa treatment aids in the release of endorphins, serotonin, and dopamine, all the chemicals responsible for our relaxation, happiness, and well-being. When it comes to physical benefits, a spa treatment can help improve circulation, relieve muscle tension, and also promote better sleep. That being said, finding a good spa in Delhi is no less than a nightmare (IYKYK). So, if you have ever been in a state where you believe that only a road roller moving on your body can get rid of all your body ache or wished that if anyone had your voodoo doll, they could massage it a little or just want to feel pampered? Then this list is going to become your favourite list. Here are 8 spas in Delhi that you can check out for all things mentioned above. Overview 1 . Sawadhee Traditional Thai Spa 2 . Aheli Spa, The Roseate 3 . Thalasso Luxury Wellness 4 . Levo Spa & Salon 5 . The Imperial Hotel Spa 6 . Wellness Club At Shangri-La 7 . J Wellness Circle, Taj Palace 8 . Tattva Wellness 9 . Encalm Spa 9 Best Spas In Delhi That Need To Be On Your Radar Sawadhee Traditional Thai Spa Sawadhee Traditional Thai Spa, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi See On Map BOOK HERE Nestled in Vasant Kunj, Sawadhee Traditional Thai Spa is a local favourite that provides quality spa treatments at affordable prices. The ambience of the spa is serene, so you're in for a relaxing experience from the get-go. The spa therapists here are known to listen and adhere to any health issues or cautions expressed by clients. They also have membership plans valid for six months to twelve months and a jacuzzi, so you can go all out when treating yourself. Google Rating: 4.5/5 Price: Treatments start at INR 1,600 Timings: 10: 30 AM to 10:00 PM Social Media: @sawadhee_spa Contact: +9111 40576340, +9111 40576341 , +91 8750023456 Aheli Spa, The Roseate Aheli Spa, New Delhi See On Map BOOK HERE If you're someone who needs a bespoke treatment that fits your body needs, then you'll love Aheli. Apart from having a rich menu of usual treatments including body scrubs, wraps, muscle tension relief, Ayurvedic therapy and more, they also have a 'Bespoke Retreats' section in their menu that has treatments essentially made for detoxifying, renewing, restoring and reviving. They also have a hammam for you to live your Turkish vacation dreams.  Google Rating: 4.5/5 Price: Treatments start at INR 2,500 Timings: 9:00 AM to 10:00 PM Social Media: @theroseate Contact:  +9111 33552211, +91 9773986654 Pro-Tip: They also have salon services available from 11:00 AM to 08:00 PM with pricing starting at just INR 400. Thalasso Luxury Wellness Thalasso Luxury Wellness, Greater Kailash - 2, New Delhi See On Map Call (+919958706222) Thalasso Luxury Wellness is a perfect escape for you if you want to leave the stress of your hectic life behind. Located in three prime locations in South Delhi (GK II, Vasant Vihar, Defence Colony), they specialise in using seawater and marine elements. Each therapy room is crafted from natural sandstone to replicate the tranquillity of a stone cave, and there's the sound of falling water in every room to give you the best possible ambience for a spa treatment.  Google Rating: 4.9/5 Price: Treatments start at INR 2,799 Timings: 11:00 AM to 11:00 PM Social Media: @thethalassospa Contact: GKII - +91 9958706222, Vasant Vihar - +91 7428235313, Defen
